task_completion.description: The agent accessed the English Wikipedia article for Capybara.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is visible showing the English Wikipedia page for 'Capybara'.

task_completion.description: The agent attempted to access or download the image from the provided Wikimedia URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the URL https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/3/34/Capybara_grazing.jpg, even if it displays a 404 Not Found error.

task_completion.description: The agent opened the Sugar Write application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sugar Write application interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The document is titled 'Animal Fact Sheet: Capybara'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Animal Fact Sheet: Capybara' is visible as the document title or heading in the Write application.

task_completion.description: The Wikipedia summary text is inserted into the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text describing the capybara (matching the Wikipedia summary) is visible in the Sugar Write document.

task_completion.description: An image of a capybara is inserted into the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image of a capybara is visible within the Sugar Write document (if the agent managed to find an alternative image after the 404 error).

task_completion.description: The document is saved as capybara_factsheet.odt in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager showing the file 'capybara_factsheet.odt' being saved to or present in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sugar desktop GUI and Write application to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Sugar Write graphical interface, rather than just terminal commands generating the .odt file.

integrity.description: The text in the document appears to be copied from Wikipedia.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the document is a detailed summary about capybaras, not just a hardcoded short sentence typed by the agent.

integrity.description: If an image is present, it is an actual image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inserted image is a valid picture, not a broken image icon or a text file renamed to .jpg.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Note: The image URL provided in the instructions (https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/3/34/Capybara_grazing.jpg) is permanently broken (404 error). Agents may fail to download or insert the image due to this, which is expected. The Wikipedia summary for 'Capybara' contains the word 'cavies' rather than 'cavy'. Expected file paths are /home/ga/Documents/capybara_500px.jpg and /home/ga/Documents/capybara_factsheet.odt. The expected title is 'Animal Fact Sheet: Capybara'.
